question_text: Does the repo provide hyperparameter sweeps or scaling recipes for each model size (25M / 85M / 170M / 302M / 567M / 3B / 10B), or must the user hand-tune for each scale?

evidence.snippet: (sole config file in repo — no per-scale yaml/json configs for 25M/85M/170M/302M/567M/3B/10B)

quick_check_verdict.notes: "Only a single example command with one set of hyperparameters is provided; there are no per-size config files or sweep scripts, though analysis notebooks like optimal_lr.ipynb and scaling_laws.ipynb exist as references users can consult.
